text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I deeply apologize. I've failed once more.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I believed I'd succeed in my next race if I worked
hard, but I fell short again...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! Is there no limit to the depths of my
inexperience?!
choice_data_list: There's no need to rush things.

Your greatest enemy is the weakness within
your own heart.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Do you mean I should first focus on strengthening
myself?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes, perhaps I was a little hasty. With everyone
else also doing their best, victory is sure to be
elusive...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I've learned an important lesson. I can't let myself
be swayed by results. I must keep pushing
forward!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's as you say. In the time I waste moping, the
other racers will only grow better and widen the
gap between us.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Now is the time for me to grit my teeth and train!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much for opening my eyes. I will
strive to never lose my way again!
